# Phase 4A — Formalization Closure: Governance Coverage Audit

**Generated by:** Phase 4A audit
**Date:** 2026-06-03
**Scope:** All governance artifacts in `docs/governance/`, `schema_registry.yaml`, and CI validators in `scripts/ci/`

---

## 1. Governance Coverage Audit

### 1.1 Governance Documents vs. Machine Enforcers

| Governance Document | Validator / CI Gate | Enforcement Type |
|----------------------|----------------------|-------------------|
| `manifest_schema_governance.md` | `scripts/ci/validate_governance_docs.py` (doc existence) + `scripts/ci/validate_benchmark_outputs.py` (payload validation) + `scripts/ci/validate_schema_registry.py` (registry entry) | CI + runtime schema check |
| `result_schema_governance.md` | `scripts/ci/validate_governance_docs.py` + `scripts/ci/validate_benchmark_outputs.py` (result payload validation) + `scripts/ci/validate_schema_registry.py` | CI + runtime schema check |
| `hash_authority.md` | `scripts/ci/validate_benchmark_outputs.py` (hash field validation) + `scripts/ci/validate_governance_docs.py` (doc existence) | CI + payload hash checks |
| `IMMUTABLE_SCHEMA_CONTRACT.md` | `tests/test_runtime_invariants.py` (drift → fail rule) + `src/helix_ids/utils/export.py` (contract sidecar enforcement) | Unit test + runtime contract validation |
| `schema_registry.yaml` | `scripts/ci/validate_schema_registry.py` | CI |
| Immutable hash fields | `tests/test_provenance.py` (tamper detection) + `scripts/ci/validate_benchmark_outputs.py` (hash field completeness) | Unit test + CI |

### 1.2 Documentation NOT Machine-Enforced

| Document | Gap Description | Risk |
|----------|----------------|------|
| `IMMUTABLE_SCHEMA_CONTRACT.md` (full policy) | Only drift→fail behavior is tested (`test_runtime_invariants.py`). Migration freeze policy and producer/consumer obligations are not programmatically enforced. | Medium — policy drift possible |
| `manifest_schema_governance.md` §4 (schema versioning rules) | Version monotonicity and date-stamp format are not validated by CI. Only field presence is checked. | Low — registry enforces version string, not chronology |
| `result_schema_governance.md` §4 (reproducibility metadata) | `determinism` sub-object fields (torch flags, python hash seed) are not independently verified — only presence is checked. | Low — actual determinism not enforced |

### 1.3 Machine-Enforced Rules Lacking Documentation

| Rule | Location | Documentation Gap |
|------|----------|-------------------|
| AST contract sidecar verification | `scripts/ci/verify_contract_sidecars.py` | No dedicated governance doc; enforced as CI gate only |
| Lifecycle promotion gates | `src/helix_ids/governance/lifecycle_verifier.py` | No schema governance doc; enforced in training pipeline |
| AST validator (governance language enforcement) | `src/helix_ids/governance/ast_validator.py` | Enforced in CI `governance_ast` job; documented in code only |
| Legacy artifact policy | `src/helix_ids/governance/parameters.py` (env vars) | `tests/test_governance/test_legacy_policy.py` enforces; no governance doc |

---

## 2. Contract Consistency Audit

### 2.1 Schema Cross-Reference

| Schema | Registry Entry | Required Fields in Registry | Required Fields in Doc | Drift Status |
|--------|---------------|----------------------------|------------------------|--------------|
| Manifest | `manifest_schema` v2026-06-02 | schema_name, current_version, status, owner, compatibility_window, deprecation_policy, approval_required | schema_version, experiment_id, dataset_id, raw_hash, processed_hash, split_hash, dataset_hash_primary, schema_hash, mapping_version, mapping_hash, config_hashes, benchmark_id, variant_id, seed, governance_state | **Consistent** |
| Result | `benchmark_result_schema` v2026-06-02 | Same 7 fields | lineage (run_id, benchmark_id, variant_id, manifest_hash, manifest_path, schema_hash, mapping_version, mapping_hash, dataset_id, dataset_hash_primary, dataset_hashes, config_hashes, model_architecture, git_commit, fingerprint), reproducibility_metadata (seed, determinism, run_id) | **Consistent** |

### 2.2 Known Contract Gaps

| Issue | Severity | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| `config_hashes` sub-key completeness | Low | Doc specifies required sub-keys but validator only checks existence of the `config_hashes` object, not its internal shape |
| `governance_state` flexibility | Low | Doc permits extension with new keys; validator does not enforce this |
| `dataset_hashes` nested object | Medium | Result doc requires `dataset_hashes.{raw,processed,split,primary}`; validator checks field presence but not nested sub-keys |

---

## 3. Existing Provenance Validation Review

### 3.1 Fingerprinting

| Component | Location | Guarantee |
|-----------|----------|-----------|
| Dataset manifest hashing | `helix_ids.governance.fingerprinting.build_dataset_manifest_hash` | SHA-256 of canonical file manifest (sorted paths + per-file size + sha256) |
| Artifact manifest | `helix_ids.governance.provenance.build_artifact_manifest` | Embeds runtime contract + architecture + git context |
| Checkpoint finalization | `helix_ids.governance.provenance.finalize_artifact_manifest` | Embeds `artifact_sha256` after save |
| Sidecar tamper detection | `helix_ids.governance.provenance.verify_artifact_manifest` | Raises `ArtifactManifestError` on sha mismatch |

### 3.2 Provenance

| Mechanism | Location | Coverage |
|-----------|----------|---------|
| Artifact manifest sidecars | `helix_ids.governance.provenance` | Checkpoint (.pt), TorchScript (.ts) |
| Contract sidecars | `helix_ids.governance.provenance.write_contract_sidecars` | `.contract.json`, `.feature_order.json`, `.schema_hash.txt` |
| Run registry | `helix_ids.governance.run_registry.RunRegistry` | Records every governed run |
| Lifecycle verifier | `helix_ids.governance.lifecycle_verifier` | Enforces stage timeout, quality gates, promotion contract |
| Failure memory | `helix_ids.governance.failure_memory` | Persists failure events for post-hoc audit |

### 3.3 Governance Lineage

| Field | Source | Usage |
|-------|--------|-------|
| `run_id` | Generated per invocation | In all result payloads and run registry entries |
| `fingerprint` | `provenance.deterministic_fingerprint()` | Uniquifies runs with same seed/dataset/config |
| `git_commit` | `provenance.resolve_git_context()` | Records exact commit at execution time |
| `manifest_hash` | From source manifest | Links result to originating benchmark manifest |
| `dataset_hashes` | Fingerprinting pipeline | Raw, processed, split, primary hashes in manifest and result |

---

## 4. Enforcement Completeness Tests

Every governance artifact is referenced by at least one validator or CI gate:

| Governance Artifact | CI Gate / Validator | Test |
|---------------------|---------------------|------|
| `docs/governance/manifest_schema_governance.md` | `validate_governance_docs.py` | `test_governance_doc_existence` (implicit) |
| `docs/governance/result_schema_governance.md` | `validate_governance_docs.py` | `test_governance_doc_existence` (implicit) |
| `docs/governance/hash_authority.md` | `validate_governance_docs.py` | `test_governance_doc_existence` (implicit) |
| `docs/governance/IMMUTABLE_SCHEMA_CONTRACT.md` | `validate_governance_docs.py` | `test_governance_doc_existence` (implicit) |
| `schema_registry.yaml` | `validate_schema_registry.py` | `test_registry_entry_validity` |
| Manifest payload fields | `validate_benchmark_outputs.py` | `test_required_manifest_fields` |
| Result payload fields | `validate_benchmark_outputs.py` | `test_required_result_fields` |
| Contract sidecars | `verify_contract_sidecars.py` | AST `governance_ast` CI job |
| Governance AST | `ast_validator.py` | `governance_ast` CI job |
| Lifecycle promotion | `lifecycle_verifier.py` | `test_lifecycle_verifier.py` |
| Provenance roundtrip | `provenance.py` | `test_provenance.py` |
| Integration enforcement | `entrypoint.py` | `test_integration_enforcement.py` (6 tests) |

See `tests/test_governance/test_enforcement_completeness.py` for the programmatic proof.
